nodes.name: Receive WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: Paste this URL in the session's Webhook URL field inside the WhatsApp Manager dashboard.

nodes.name: Respond 200 OK
nodes.notes: Immediately acknowledge receipt so the WhatsApp server doesn't retry.

nodes.name: Is Text Message?
nodes.notes: Branch: text messages go left, media/other go right.

nodes.name: Process & Build Reply
nodes.notes: Customize the keyword logic and reply messages here.

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Reply
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR-APP-DOMAIN with your actual server domain. Set the X-API-Key header in the HTTP Header Auth credential.

nodes.name: Log Media Message
nodes.notes: Extend this node to handle image/video/audio messages as needed.
